name: [Scheduled] Daily Scrubbing (Placements)
description: Checks bench VA and placement requirement records on weekdays, identifies missing data for scrubbing, and updates the VA and placement record with the scrubbing flag, missing fields, and last scrubbed timestamp.

options.name: Lost Interest due to bench duration
options.value: Lost Interest due to bench duration

options.name: Did not turn up after being endorsed to OPS
options.value: Did not turn up after being endorsed to OPS

parameters.content: Searches the VA who are in Bench, Bench - PT, and Bench - Oncall
Runs a loop for every 30 records to have a manageable bandwidth in updating the AT table.
Checks the completeness of the pre-defined fields.
Updates the table as to what fields are missing.
Compiles the findings and puts them in the Daily Scrubbing table in AT.
Searches the requirements tagged as Ongoing & New
